my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Migrate the import statement from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Java 11+ and not present in standard Jakarta EE 9+ distributions; code fails to compile without the jakarta import.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.annotation does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Update marker checking logic to use the new getMarkerList() API introduced in SLF4J 2.0.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The method ILoggingEvent.getMarker() is deprecated in SLF4J 2.0 and may be removed in future versions; using getMarkerList() ensures compatibility with the new API where markers are handled as a list.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.after:
List<Marker> markers = event.getMarkerList();
if ((markers != null && !markers.isEmpty() && markers.get(0).contains(CRLF_SAFE_MARKER)) || isLoggerSafe(event))

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Add import for java.util.List to support the new marker list logic.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The code now uses the List interface, requiring the import to compile.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Replace Hibernate 5 Jackson module with Hibernate 6 module to align with the upgraded Hibernate version.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: Hibernate5Module is removed or incompatible with Hibernate 6; using it causes compilation errors or runtime linkage failures.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Replace deprecated Profiles.of() with matchesProfiles() for profile checking.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: Profiles.of() is deprecated in Spring Framework 5.3+ and removed in Spring Framework 6.0 (required for Spring Boot 3.x / Java 17+), causing compilation errors.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Update Liquibase contexts and labels setters to use comma-delimited strings instead of collections.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: Liquibase 4.x+ deprecated/removed setContexts(Collection) and setLabels(Collection) in favor of setContexts(String) and setLabelFilter(String), causing compilation errors due to missing methods.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Security 5 annotations with Spring Security 6 equivalents.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The classes EnableWebSecurity and EnableGlobalMethodSecurity were removed in Spring Security 6; using them causes a compilation error.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity DSL to use lambda-based configuration and new matcher types.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The methods authorizeRequests(), antMatchers(), and the fluent .and() chaining were removed in Spring Security 6; using them causes a compilation error.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 (required for JDK 17) uses Jakarta EE 9+, so javax.servlet classes are no longer available, causing compilation errors.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Remove dependency on removed SecurityProblemSupport class.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The class org.zalando.problem.spring.web.advice.security.SecurityProblemSupport was removed or relocated in newer versions, causing compilation errors if imported.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Remove constructor injection of removed dependencies.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The fields corsFilter and problemSupport are removed, so injecting them causes compilation errors.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.before: public SecurityConfiguration(CorsFilter corsFilter, JHipsterProperties jHipsterProperties, SecurityProblemSupport problemSupport)

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Replace custom JwtGrantedAuthorityConverter with inline converter.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The class JwtGrantedAuthorityConverter was removed from the codebase, causing a compilation error if referenced.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Add MvcRequestMatcher bean for Spring Security 6 request matching.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: Spring Security 6 requires MvcRequestMatcher.Builder for MVC-based request matching; without it, the new authorizeHttpRequests configuration cannot compile or function correctly.
